interpretation: The de-novo antigen-presentation axis shares 57% of its variance with immune infiltration (Spearman rho=0.77); every antigen gene (B2M/HLA-A/HLA-B/TAP1/TAP2/PSMB9) is 0.54-0.79 correlated with the infiltration axis. This explains why residualizing infiltration within-fold substantially collapses the within-Gide response signal for this 6-gene panel (LOO 0.871 -> 0.638); the 3-gene headline panel behaves the same way (0.888 -> 0.621). The axis largely reports how much immune infiltrate is present, not a tumor-intrinsic antigenicity state.

within_gide_loo.note: Same 6-gene panel this decomposition uses. (The 3-gene B2M/HLA-A/TAP1 headline panel goes 0.888->0.621 under the same operation.)
